title: Validity and Reliability Diagnostic
description: Distinguish threats to research validity from threats to research reliability and recommend an appropriate design correction.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AI Persona Testing
Marketing Research
Validity and Reliability Diagnostic

learningObjectives: Distinguish threats to research validity from threats to research reliability and recommend an appropriate design correction.
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with customer research and AI personas

commonMisconceptions: Synthetic agreement is equivalent to validated customer evidence.
